name: Rebased branch keeps pointing at an old branch build
query: We rebased and now the baseline behavior is confusing.
context: The customer rebased the branch on main, force-pushed, and then reported that Chromatic reused a previous branch build in a way they did not expect.
expected_behavior: Explains why rebases can change baseline expectations
Mentions `ignoreLastBuildOnBranch` only when it fits the described pattern
success_criteria: The response does not pretend the current run is using a normal ancestor path
The next step is limited to one setting or one proof artifact
